summary: Iteration 29 - Testing 3 New EchoEvents Modules Complete. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Scenario Planner (side-by-side comparison forms, Run Comparison button, Training/Saved tabs), Menu Ingest (seasons sidebar, PDF upload area, test season visible), Client Portal (4-step prospect wizard, Lead Management dashboard with test lead visible). Also verified 12th knowledge domain (av_decor_vendor) is loaded.
critical_code_review_comments: Scenario Planner correctly builds scenarios with financials, staffing, risk_flags, and vendor_analysis
Scenario comparison returns deltas and comparison_summary for side-by-side analysis
Vendor dependency triggers fire correctly when program_elements include stage/band/photo booth assets
Menu Ingest seasons CRUD works correctly with MongoDB persistence
Menu Ingest PDF upload endpoint accepts files and stores in /app/backend/uploads/menus/
Client Portal event-types endpoint returns all required fields (event_types, tiers, enhancements, service_styles, meal_periods, budget_ranges)
Client Portal estimate endpoint returns price range with enhancement breakdown
Client Portal lead submission creates lead with estimate and client_resume
Lead assignment and status updates work correctly with validation
Knowledge Engine now has 12 domains including av_decor_vendor for vendor dependency analysis
All 3 new modules registered in panel-registry.ts and panel-metadata.ts
Sidebar shows all 3 modules under Events & Catering section
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER29_Spring_2026 season and TEST_ITER29 TestUser lead during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified 3 new EchoEvents modules. Key endpoints: Scenario Planner (GET /api/scenario-planner/room-templates, /vendor-assets, /setup-styles, /packages, /footprints, /training, POST /build-scenario, /compare), Menu Ingest (GET/POST /api/menu-ingest/seasons, GET /seasons/{id}, POST /upload/{season_id}, GET /uploads/{season_id}, /categories/{season_id}), Client Portal (GET /api/portal/event-types, POST /estimate, /submit-lead, GET /leads, PUT /leads/{id}/assign, /leads/{id}/status). Frontend panels accessible via sidebar under 'Events & Catering' section. Knowledge Engine now has 12 domains including av_decor_vendor.

frontend_tests.sidebar_entries: PASS - Scenario Planner, Menu Ingestion, Client Portal under Events & Catering

client_portal_panel.event_type_buttons: PASS - Wedding, Corporate, Social, Holiday, Nonprofit
client_portal_panel.test_lead_visible: PASS - TEST_ITER29 TestUser with QUALIFIED status

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use deterministic rule engines backed by LUCCCA knowledge bases loaded from JSON files in /tmp/luccca_kb/

scenario_planner.reference_data: Room templates, vendor assets, setup styles, packages, footprints, training scenarios
scenario_planner.build_scenario: Financials (net_total, total_pp, fnb_total), staffing (foh, boh, total), risk_flags, vendor_analysis
scenario_planner.compare_scenarios: Side-by-side comparison with deltas (net_total, total_pp, fnb_total, total_staff, margin_pct_pp) and comparison_summary
scenario_planner.vendor_dependency: Triggers fire when program_elements include stage/band/photo booth assets

menu_ingest.pdf_upload: POST /upload/{season_id} accepts PDF files (not tested with actual PDF)

client_portal.event_types: 5 event types, 4 tiers, 10 enhancements, service styles, meal periods, budget ranges
client_portal.estimate: Price range estimate with enhancement breakdown
client_portal.lead_submission: Creates lead with prospect info, event details, estimate, client_resume
client_portal.lead_management: List leads with stats, assign lead, update status

frontend_panels.scenario_planner: Side-by-side comparison forms, Run Comparison button, Training/Saved tabs
frontend_panels.menu_ingest: Seasons sidebar, PDF upload area, category filters
frontend_panels.client_portal: 4-step prospect wizard, Lead Management dashboard with status filters
